whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Business
whatsapp.subtitle: Connect your business's WhatsApp number so the bot can answer customers.
whatsapp.connectIntro: Click below and sign in with Facebook. You'll be guided through choosing or creating your WhatsApp Business Account, and we'll handle the rest.
whatsapp.disconnectIntro: Disconnecting will stop messages from being routed to this business.
whatsapp.notConfigured: WhatsApp onboarding isn't available yet — the Meta App is still pending approval. Please check back later.
